---
title: "System Elements"
draft: false
class: "402"

---

# Care Providers
- Primary care visit capacity
- Primary care care coordination capacity
- Specialty care visit capacity
- Specialty care referral availability

# Federal and State Policy / Enforcement and Accountability
Choose at least one element from **Federal and State Policy** or **Enforcement and Accountability.***
## Federal and State Policy
- Medicaid eligibility rules
- Medicare coverage rules
- State scope-of-practice laws
- Federal regulatory requirements

## Enforcement and Accountability
- Capacity for administrative processing
- Sanctions
- Reimbursement requirements
- Administrative Staffing
# Financing / Insurance
*Choose at least one from this list.*
- Medicare enrollment
- Medicaid enrollment
- Employer-based insurance enrollment
- Uninsured population size
# Funding
- State general fund health allocations
- Federal discretionary health funding
- Public health grant funding
- Safety-net provider subsidies
-  Household out-of-pocket spending
# Payment Models
*Choose at least one from this list.*
- Fee-for-service payment prevalence
- Value-based payment adoption
- Capitated payment prevalence
- Bundled payment use

# Pharmaceuticals and Devices
- Prescription drug pricing levels
- Drug formulary restrictions
- Medical device availability
- Pharmaceutical market concentration
# Public Health
- Public health surveillance capacity
- Preventive service availability
- Community-based health program capacity
- Health communication effectiveness
# Structural Determinants
*Choose at least one from this list.*
- Housing stability
- Income security
- Transportation access
- Environmental conditions
# Structural Inequities
*Choose at least one from this list.*
- Racialized residential segregation
- Occupational stratification by race and gender
- Differential exposure to environmental hazards
- Inequitable access to health-promoting resources

# Workforce / Infrastructure
*Choose at least one element either from **Workforce** or from **Infrastructure.***
## Workforce
- Primary care clinician supply
- Specialist clinician supply
- Nursing workforce availability
- Public health workforce capacity
## Infrastructure
- Hospital bed capacity
- Primary care facility availability
- Health information technology interoperability
- Emergency care access
